config.name: The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West
config.blurb: The text editions from the book S. Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987 (2015 reprint). Buy the book from Eisenbrauns.
